# mountPoint

**Instance Property**

The file system mount point for a camera using the mass storage transport type.

## Declaration

```swift
var mountPoint: String? { get }
```

## Discussion

This property is set for cameras whose [doc://com.apple.imagecapturecore/documentation/ImageCaptureCore/ICDevice/transportType] is [doc://com.apple.imagecapturecore/documentation/ImageCaptureCore/ICDeviceTransport/transportTypeMassStorage].
title: mountPoint
